content: Sub-problem 1 (WindowConfig Migration): COMPLETE. Moved WindowConfig from engine_render::window to engine_core::window. Deleted old window.rs. Updated 6 imports across 6 files (lib.rs, prelude.rs, app.rs, app.rs tests, gpu_init.rs, renderer.rs). Added WindowConfig re-export to engine_core::prelude. All 4 concrete proofs in subtree pass. cargo check --all clean.

Sub-problem 2 (Plugin Hooks + RenderPlugin): COMPLETE. Added App::on_resumed/on_resize/on_post_render hook registrations. Moved renderer creation from App::resumed() direct call to hook closures in register_render(). RenderPlugin struct in engine_render::plugin is a config data holder — actual hook registration lives in axiom2d (circular dep constraint: engine crates cannot depend on engine_app). Hook dispatch uses std::mem::take/swap pattern to avoid double-mut-borrow. 37 engine_app tests pass including new headless survival test. All card_game tests (914) still pass.

Sub-problem 3 (Headless Mode): COMPLETE. Made engine_render optional dep in engine_app Cargo.toml (feature="render", default on). Feature-gated RendererRes import + set_renderer() in app.rs. Feature-gated mouse_world_pos_system module (depends on Camera2D from engine_render). axiom2d's render feature now passes through to engine_app/render. Splash letters/rendering modules feature-gated. Headless build: cargo check -p axis2d --no-default-features succeeds. All existing tests pass with default features.
